title: LSN Ce Pack
description: Texture pack that gives custom textures to enchants on lifesteal.net
body:
Custom Enchant pack for lifesteal.net! This texture pack works on versions 1.21.6+. 

Variants CIT is a required mod for this pack to work!

I will be trying to update this pack for every change the devs add to custom enchants! If you have any questions, message zynk5210 on discord. Updated as of 4/12/26

**Required**
- Variants CIT download: [https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit)
